characters.name: Ira Buchman
characters.description: Ira BuchmanCharacterBiographical InformationGender:MaleStatus:AliveBirthdate:1956Physical DescriptionSpecies:HumanHair color:BrownEye color:BrownShow InformationFirst appearance:"The Wedding Affair"Relevant PagesNo Gallery Ira Buchmanis a main character onNBC'sMad About You. He is the landlord of his cousinPaul Buchman. He is portrayed by starring cast memberJohn Pankow. Ira continues to be the landlord for his cousin Paul, and Paul's family includingJamieand daughterMabel, who is getting ready to leave for college.

characters.name: Jamie Stemple-Buchman
characters.description: Jamie Stemple BuchmanCharacterBiographical InformationGender:FemaleBirthdate:February 12, 1963Occupation:Public RelationsRelatives:Paul Buchman(husband)Mabel Buchman(daughter)Lisa Stemple(sister)Gus Stemple(father)Theresa Stemple(mother)Burt Buchman(father-in-law)Sylvia Buchman(mother-in-law)Debbie Buchman(sister-in-law)Sharon Buchman(sister-in-law)Ira Buchman(cousin-in-law)Physical DescriptionHair color:BlondeShow InformationPortrayed by:Helen HuntFirst appearance:"Romantic Improvisations"Latest appearance:"The Final Frontier (Part 2)"Relevant PagesGALLERYJamie Stemple Buchmanis a main character on NBC'sMad About You. She works with PR and is the wife of Paul and sister of Lisa. She is portrayed by starring cast member Helen Hunt. Some years after the events of "The Final Frontier (Part 2)", Jamie is still dealing with day-to-day life while her now grown-up daughter,Mabel, is getting ready to leave for college.

characters.name: Ursula Buffay
characters.description: Ursula was a particularly inept waitress, often forgetting orders entirely. Her character was more fully developed inFriends"as something of an antagonist or evil twin". On the last episode ofMad About You, it was revealed that Ursula would become the Governor of New York in the future.
